entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 15
entries.excerpt: After this God appeared to Abram in a vision and said: “Thy reward shall be exceeding great (Gen 15:1), for thy progress in righteousness and for the deliverance of the captives by thee.” “And Abram said: …what wilt thou give me? for I go childless… and the steward of my house is my heir… And he brought him forth abroad, and said: Look now toward heaven, and number the stars, if thou be able to number them: and he said: So shall thy seed be. And Abram believed… and it was counted to him for righteousness” (Gen 15:2–3, 5–6) — and indeed for great righteousness.…
